params.name: Tangram
params.description:
On Apr 23, 1753 AD, Tangram was taken to Europe by an Arabian merchant.
Tangram is a traditional puzzle toy in China, very popular among the Chinese folks. Tangram can be broken into seven pieces, including a square, five triangles of different sizes, and a parallelogram. In the eighteenth century, Tangram was taken to the western world, stirring up a phenomenon. The westerners called it the Tangram and would stay up all night playing it. Allan Pole, an American writer ordered a set of ivory …
